description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages (build, test, deploy), a pip cache at .pip-cache/ keyed by pyproject.toml, and variables BARE_IMAGE, CUSTOM_IMAGE, PIP_CACHE_DIR, etc. In the build stage add a build:wheel job that uses the $BARE_IMAGE image, runs `python -m pip install -U pip build`, `python -m build --wheel --sdist`, and `ls -l dist/`, always runs, and publishes the dist/ directory as an artifact named dist-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA that expires in 7 days. In the test stage add a style_check job using $BARE_IMAGE that installs pip and flake8 with `python -m pip install -U pip flake8` and runs `flake8 doc/ examples/ dynasor/ tests/`, runs on all non‑schedule pipelines, and has no artifacts. Also in test add a documentation job using $CUSTOM_IMAGE that installs documentation dependencies (`python -m pip install -U pip` and `pip install ".[documentation]"`), creates the public folder, runs `sphinx-build -b doctest -W doc/ public/` and `sphinx-build -W doc/ public/`, runs on non‑master, non‑tag, non‑schedule pipelines, and stores the public/ directory as a 7‑day artifact. Add five test jobs (test:py39, test:py310, test:py311, test:py312, test:py313) that extend the .test_template, each using `python:$PYTHON_VERSION` image, executing before_script `python -m pip install -U pip` and `pip install ".[test]"`, then `xdoctest dynasor`, `coverage run -m pytest --verbose --junitxml=report.xml tests/`, setting `COVERAGE_OPTIONS="--omit=dynasor/core/rho_j_q_numba.py,dynasor/post_processing/filon.py"` and running `coverage report -m $COVERAGE_OPTIONS`, `coverage xml -o coverage.xml $COVERAGE_OPTIONS`, `coverage html $COVERAGE_OPTIONS`; they produce JUnit report.xml, coverage.xml and htmlcov/ artifacts, allow failure on schedule and manual runs except test:py313 which always runs and fails the pipeline on error. In the deploy stage add a pages job extending .pages_template with $CUSTOM_IMAGE that fetches the latest tag and branch, builds Sphinx docs for stable and dev, writes a switcher.json, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, running on the master branch or any tag; add a pages_verification job extending the same template that runs manually on non‑master, non‑tag pipelines and is allowed to fail; finally add a pypi job using $CUSTOM_IMAGE that installs pip, build and twine, fetches tags, checks out the tag if present, builds the package, runs `twine check dist/*` and uploads to PyPI with the $PYPI_TOKEN, and runs manually on tag pipelines.
